name: Fossil Machine Skull Convoy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>古</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マシン スカルコンボイ
desc:
1 Rock monster in your GY + 1 Level 7 or higher monster
Must first be Special Summoned with "Fossil Fusion". While you control this Fusion Summoned card, all monsters your opponent controls lose ATK equal to their original DEF. This card can make up to 3 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
attack: Can make multiple attacks on monsters
